subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who desireth to follow his Ancient Lord, that it may strengthen him in that which hath been sent down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا الی الذی اراد ان یتبع مولاه القدیم لیویده ما نزل عن جهه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @exhortations and counsels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
